name: Cloudastructure, Inc.
summary:
Cloudastructure, Inc. (CSAI) reported a loss of $0.14 per share on revenue of $1.32 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus revenue estimate was revenue of $1.50 million.

Cloudastructure’s advanced award-winning security platform utilizes a scalable cloud-based architecture that features cloud video surveillance with proprietary, state-of-the-art AI/ML analytics, and a seamless remote guarding solution.
subject: Cloudastructure, Inc. Reported Earnings

name: Autoliv Inc.
summary:
Autoliv (ALV) reported earnings of $2.43 per share on revenue of $2.80 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.34 per share on revenue of $2.76 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.45 per share. The company missed expectations by 0.82% while revenue grew 3.28% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it continues to expect 2026 revenue of approximately $11.14 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $11.15 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Autoliv Inc is a developer, manufacturer and supplier to the automotive industry of automotive safety systems. The Company' products include passive safety systems and active safety systems.
subject: Autoliv Missed Expectations

name: Travelers Companies, Inc.
summary:
Travelers Companies (TRV) reported earnings of $10.04 per share on revenue of $12.15 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $5.31 per share on revenue of $12.28 billion. The company beat consensus estimates by 89.08% while revenue grew 0.31% on a year-over-year basis.

Travelers Companies Inc through its subsidiaries provides commercial & personal property and casualty insurance products and services to businesses, government units, associations and individuals.
subject: Travelers Companies Beat Consensus Estimates

name: Fifth Third Bancorp
summary:
Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) reported earnings of $1.02 per share on revenue of $4.43 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.98 per share on revenue of $3.25 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.01 per share. The company beat expectations by 0.99% while revenue grew 37.01% on a year-over-year basis.

Fifth Third Bancorp along with its subsidiaries provides financial products and services such as checking, savings and money market accounts, and credit products such as credit cards, installment loans, mortgage loans and leases.
subject: Fifth Third Bancorp Beat Expectations

name: Truist Financial Corporation
summary:
Truist Financial (TFC) reported earnings of $1.23 per share on revenue of $7.61 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.08 per share on revenue of $5.21 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.12 per share. The company beat expectations by 9.82% while revenue grew 0.75% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said in its earnings presentation it expects third-quarter revenue of approximately $5.35 billion and now expects 2026 revenue of $21.22 billion to $21.32 billion. The company's previous guidance was 2026 revenue of approximately $21.32 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $5.35 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026 and revenue of $21.11 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) is a purpose-driven financial services company committed to inspire and build better lives and communities. Formed by the historic merger of equals of BB&T and SunTrust, Truist has leading market share in many high-growth markets in the country.
subject: Truist Financial Beat Expectations

name: South Plains Financial, Inc.
summary:
South Plains Financial (SPFI) reported earnings of $0.96 per share on revenue of $89.15 million for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.86 per share on revenue of $64.45 million. The company beat consensus estimates by 11.63% while revenue grew 16.84% on a year-over-year basis.

South Plains Financial Inc. is the bank holding company for City Bank, a chartered bank. It provides commercial and consumer financial services to small and medium-sized businesses and individuals. The company's principal business activities include commercial and retail banking along with insurance, investment trust and mortgage services. South Plains Financial Inc. is headquartered in Lubbock, Texas.
subject: South Plains Financial Beat Consensus Estimates

name: Regions Financial Corporation
summary:
Regions Financial (RF) reported earnings of $0.68 per share on revenue of $2.38 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.64 per share on revenue of $1.95 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.66 per share. The company beat expectations by 3.03% while revenue fell 2.14% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

Regions Financial Corporation is one of the nation’s largest full-service providers of consumer and commercial banking, wealth management, and mortgage products and services.
subject: Regions Financial Beat Expectations
